rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed inside `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax and follow AADL component type or implementation scope rules.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annexes only in valid component type or implementation scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` to wrap AGREE contract content in AADL.
anti_patterns: Do not insert AGREE annexes outside of valid AADL component type or implementation scopes.
